violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the fans inside of 'low boy' refrigeration units have an accumulation of dust. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2024

The drain plugs for the outside dumpsters are missing. Drains in receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must have drain plugs in place. New Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2024
